seoTitle: Frog Rock vs Frogmore — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Frog Rock and Frogmore. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Frog Rock vs Frogmore: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Frog Rock and Frogmore.
heading: Frog Rock vs Frogmore — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Frog Rock, New South Wales and Frogmore, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Frogmore has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Frog Rock (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Frog Rock or Frogmore safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Frog Rock has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Frogmore scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Frog Rock scores 32/100 for bushfire risk. Frogmore scores 29/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Frog Rock or Frogmore?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Frogmore has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
